message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "Application" as Application
participant "«engine» Auto SDK Engine" as Engine
participant "«avs» Alexa" as Alexa

section "Activating Trial"
    alt "Activating Trial"
        note right of Application
            clicks `Activate Trial` button on screen to activate trial up-sell.
        end
        Application -> Engine : Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying ACTIVATE_TRIAL event
    end
end

section "Activating Paid Plan"
    alt "Activating Paid Plan"
        note right of Application
            clicks `Activate Paid Plan` button on screen to activate paid plan up-sell.
        end
        Application -> Engine : Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying ACTIVATE_PAID_PLAN event
    end
end

section "Successful in sending event to Alexa"
    alt "Successful in sending event to Alexa"
        Application -> Engine : Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with SUCCESS status
    else "on failure"
        Application -> Engine : Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with FAIL status
    end
end

@enduml
